send.title: Send Notification
send.subtitle: Compose and send push notifications to users
send.userIdsHint: Enter user IDs separated by commas, e.g. 1, 42, 100
send.userIdsRequired: Please enter at least one valid user ID
send.filterHint: At least one filter (Car Type, Car Model, or City) must be selected. Only users matching the filter will receive the notification.
send.filterRequired: At least one filter must be selected
send.offerDateFormat: Date must be in format YYYY-MM-DD
send.offerTimeFormat: Time must be in format HH:MM:SS
send.offerScheduleHint: Example: Date: 2026-12-25, Time: 14:30:00. The notification will be scheduled for this date and time.
send.offerDateRequired: Date and time are required for offer notifications.
